subagents.notes: Added SP3 rule to 5 surfaces (3 SKILL.md + 2 templates). Canonical phrase 'confirm against the live tree'. Confirmed scenario 35 free first (ate the SP3 dogfood). Scenario 34 + 35 both green; 26/27/28 no regression. Minor non-blocking flag: plan-template.md line 5 carries a pre-existing 'set in v1.22.0' archaeology phrase, outside scenario 34's skills/*/SKILL.md scan scope — candidate if a future prose-lint widens to reference templates.

Added doc-sync supersession gate (release SKILL.md Phase 2 Step 2c + doc-sync-procedure.md) + scenario 36 (6 cases incl. live ADR-0020 pair). Scenario 36 + 34 both green; 33 no regression. Two findings: (1) the live corpus has TWO Superseded records (ADR-0020 partial AND ADR-0001 partial), not one — grill OQ-1 undercounted; rarity argument holds, count is 2. (2) ADR-0023 has a YAML-template Status line inside a code fence; the scan correctly excludes it via code-fence-aware status extraction.

aggregate.verification: Both slice branches merged into feature/v1.24.0-chain-fidelity (no conflicts — disjoint scopes). Full dogfood suite on merged HEAD d64b63e: 19 pass / 2 fail.
